episodes.title: Robertson signs, Greaves avoids arbitration, and Kane returns to Chicago ft. David Pagnotta
episodes.summary: On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period and Daily Faceoff. The Jason Robertson saga is over! The Stars have signed the three-time 40 goal scorer to a one-year deal worth $12 million that will walk up to unrestricted free agency
